name: ASUS PRO H610M-CT D4-CSM Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-3200 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - M.2 Slot - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - DisplayPort 1.4 - D-Sub - HDMI 2.1 - Intel GbE LAN - M.2 slot only (Key E, CNVi & PCIe)
shortName: ASUS PRO H610M-CT D4-CSM Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro ATX Intel H610 professional motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR4 and DisplayPort 1.4.
